name: Allosaurus
description: A large carnivorous dinosaur known for its sharp teeth and bipedal stance.

name: Brachiosaurus
description: A massive, long-necked herbivorous dinosaur with a tall body and relatively short tail.

name: Compsognathus
description: A small, bipedal dinosaur with sharp teeth, known for its agility.

name: Diplodocus
description: A large, long-necked dinosaur with a whip-like tail and a plant-eating diet.

name: Eoraptor
description: One of the earliest known dinosaurs, a small, bipedal predator.

name: Futalognkosaurus
description: A giant, long-necked dinosaur with a lengthy name.

name: Gallimimus
description: A fast-running, ostrich-like dinosaur known for its speed.

name: Hypsilophodon
description: A small, herbivorous dinosaur with a beak-like mouth and a bipedal stance.

name: Iguanodon
description: A herbivorous dinosaur with a thumb spike, known for its ability to walk on both two and four legs.

name: Juravenator
description: A small, carnivorous dinosaur from the Late Jurassic period.

name: Kosmoceratops
description: A horned dinosaur with an elaborate frill and facial features.

name: Lambeosaurus
description: A duck-billed dinosaur known for its distinctive crest.

name: Megalosaurus
description: One of the first dinosaurs to be named and described, a large carnivorous dinosaur.

name: Nanotyrannus
description: A smaller relative of Tyrannosaurus rex, known for its sharp teeth.

name: Oviraptor
description: A dinosaur with a controversial name that means 'egg thief.'

name: Parasaurolophus
description: A duck-billed dinosaur with a long, hollow crest on its head.

name: Quetzalcoatlus
description: One of the largest flying reptiles, not a dinosaur, but often associated with them.

name: Raptors
description: A group of small to medium-sized, carnivorous dinosaurs known for their intelligence.

name: Stegosaurus
description: A herbivorous dinosaur known for its double row of bony plates and spikes.

name: Triceratops
description: A large, herbivorous dinosaur with three facial horns and a frill.

name: Utahraptor
description: A large, predatory dinosaur known for its sharp claws.

name: Velociraptor
description: A small, predatory dinosaur with a sickle-shaped claw on each foot.

name: Wuerhosaurus
description: A type of stegosaurid dinosaur.

name: Xenoceratops
description: A dinosaur with a name that means 'alien horned face.'

name: Yi
description: A small, feathered dinosaur from the Early Jurassic period.

name: Zephyrosaurus
description: A small, herbivorous dinosaur with a lightweight build.
